Snapshot the current codebook to codebook_live.json

Source: R/live_tracking.R
live_snapshot_codebook.Rd

Atomic rewrite: writes to a temp file in the same directory, then file.renames over the live file. A researcher cat-ing the file always sees a coherent snapshot (no torn read).

Usage

live_snapshot_codebook(
  tracker,
  codebook,
  entry_index = NA_integer_,
  force = FALSE
)

Arguments

tracker

A LiveTracker or NULL

codebook

coding_state$codebook (named list of code records)

entry_index

Optional integer; used in the snapshot timestamp

force

Logical; bypass the every-N gate (used at end-of-coding)

Value

The (possibly updated) tracker, invisibly.

Details

Honors tracker$codebook_snapshot_every: writes only when the tracker's n_codebook_snapshots would increment to a multiple of the cadence (i.e., every-N-entries).

Safe to call with tracker = NULL (no-op).

On this page
